opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I tripped on the driveway and took the skin clean off my knee; the stinging is agonizing, and I can't wash the gravel out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I scraped my knee badly on concrete an hour ago and there's gravel stuck in it I can't clean.

symptom_narrative.character: raw grazed skin, stinging/burning, weeping, gravel embedded
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant sting, worse with clothing contact
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: clear weeping and pinpoint bleeding; dirt/gravel embedded; NO deep gaping cut, no exposed fat/muscle, full knee movement, no numbness; last tetanus probably >10 years ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; no sterile irrigation supplies at home; tetanus status uncertain/>10y

objective_data_offered.value: ~8x6cm raw graze on the front of the knee, weeping, with embedded gravel/dirt, no deep gaping, visible on video
can move the knee fully; foot warm with normal feeling
